title: Weapons of the Wild
body:
![Weapons of the wild mod welcome image. A player stands between two armor stands holding modded weapons and items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909dbf3ea00287691042c030ac98f1fa71a24e6e_0.webp) Weapons of the wilds aims to add a bunch of new and unique weapons types, each one having its own mechanic/gimmick. ## Design Philosophy Weapons of the Wilds doesn't add new unique weapons like the mace or trident, but rather, **weapon types** which do not aim to replace the vanilla ones (swords, axes, spears), but rather add more options to choose from. This means that each weapon added will have all the tiers from wood to netherite. This mod also tries to make the weapons biome-themed so that there's genuinely new unique options for the player progression (aside from new blocks :p). Also fantasy theme cuz there's already so many awesome history themed weapons mod. # The weapons Currently there's only 1 weapon type ## MossThorn The Mossthorn are polearms with a living organism attached to them. When you hit an entity with any Mossthorn one of two things will happen: 1. if the entity is **NOT** on top of the allowed blocks, but is on top of a [moss replaceable](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Moss_Block#Post-generation) block, the Mossthorn will try to use one bonemeal from the player's inventory and spread moss at that entity's feet. (try it on water!)(Also pls don't loose all your bonemeal!) 2. If the entity **IS** on top of the allowed blocks, the Mossthorn will generate an "Entangling roots" block that slows down entities slightly worse than cobwebs (does not affect Mossthorn wielding entities). The allowed blocks where entangling roots will generate are the following: ![Image of allowed blocks with entangling roots block on top of each one, from left to right: Moss, Azalea, Flowering Azalea, Rooted Dirt, Podzol, Mycelium, Muddy Mangrove Roots and Mangrove Roots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca5df654c4f959050d2010a32f5bc660aa3e90e_0.webp) (Moss, Azalea, Flowering Azalea, Rooted Dirt, Podzol, Mycelium, Muddy Mangrove Roots and Mangrove Roots)
Entangling Roots:

Once generated by a Mossthorn, the entangling roots block can be harvested using shears. When placing entangling roots obtained this way the block will change up to 5 variants depending on the block below:

![Image of all entangling roots block variants, from left to right: stripped variant on top of stone, mossy variant on top of moss block, mycelium variant on top of mycelium block, crimson variant on top of crimson nylium and warped variant on top of warped nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfb6cfaccec8a0cf4e67529800ab668321fa2874.png)

(Stripped, Mossy, Mycelium, Crimson and Warped)

Entangling roots blocks can also be harvested using silk touch, this will give the specific variant item and will allow the player to place said variant on any block!

## Crafting To craft a Mossthorn weapon, you need to obtain Living Moss: ![Image of living Moss crafting recipe alternative 1 of 2, it requires 4 big dripleaf, one at each corner, 4 rooted dirt, one between each big dripleaf and a spore blossom at the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d3ac723955979ab128ba0f16f070f0730d3473.png) ![Image of living Moss crafting recipe alternative 2 of 2, it requires 4 big dripleaf, one at each corner, 4 hanging roots, one between each big dripleaf and a spore blossom at the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1c50de810ea3016abfe9713b5b87746dbc3742d.png) (do not perpetuate the cycle of existence!) After doing so, you can craft your Mossthorn: ![Image of wooden mossthorn crafting recipee, it requires 1 plank on top right corner slot, a stick on the middle and bottom left slots and living moss item around the plank, top middle and center right slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de69c9c5e323480216915083e067f41dc28bdada.png)
All the recipes:

Stone:

![Image of stone mossthorn crafting recipee, it requires 1 cobblestone on top right corner slot, a stick on the middle and bottom left slots and living moss item around the cobblestone, top middle and center right slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2c7435ad4e92de1fe8c016a9d4ce408a82aed0e.png)

Copper:

![Image of copper mossthorn crafting recipee, it requires 1 copper ingot on top right corner slot, a stick on the middle and bottom left slots and living moss item around the copper ingot , top middle and center right slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2afd997ba8908389cf7a6331e449a35ffe355472.png)

Iron:

![Image of iron mossthorn crafting recipee, it requires 1 iron ingot on top right corner slot, a stick on the middle and bottom left slots and living moss item around the iron ingot, top middle and center right slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f4eb98313e54663f165e0de6bd513821000002.png)

Gold:

![Image of golden mossthorn crafting recipee, it requires 1 gold ingot on top right corner slot, a stick on the middle and bottom left slots and living moss item around the gold ingot, top middle and center right slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/932ea616b7fe5c48cab086918a74e8606ea86bb4.png)

Diamond:

![Image of diamond mossthorn crafting recipee, it requires 1 diamond on top right corner slot, a stick on the middle and bottom left slots and living moss item around the diamond, top middle and center right slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ffd4570fa5bf78277a126bc71d20afca4caefc.png)

Netherite:

![Image of netherite mossthorn smithing recipee, it requires one netherite upgrade, one diamond mossthorn and a netherite ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f0eaba778328850b94fc4c193b3834ea29a32a.png)
## Netherthorn There's an upgrade available to gold, diamond and netherite mossthorn, these are the **crimsonthorn** and **warpedthorn**. They are obtained by adding either warped or crimson nylium to the weapon in a smithing table (no template needed) Both variants act the same (difference is only visual) and add the following blocks to the list of allowed surfaces to generate roots: ![Image of allowed blocks that are added by netherthorn, from left to right: crimson nylium, nether wart block, crimson stem, crimson hyphae, warped nylium, warped wart block, warped stem and warped hyphae](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e490eec04e34a65a9b38b055fe725c9719540c5f.png)
All Netherthorn recipes:

Gold:

![Golden crimsonthorn smithing recipe, it requires no template/upgrade, either a golden mossthorn or golden warpedthorn and a crimson nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e6fcb20623dba25cf4a67ce9094e9c493339092.png) ![Golden warpedthorn smithing recipe, it requires no template/upgrade, either a golden mossthorn or golden crimsonthorn and a warped nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3148106d97e262ce67c59415769994fe980a070.png)

Diamond:

![Diamond crimsonthorn smithing recipe, it requires no template/upgrade, either a diamond mossthorn or diamond warpedthorn and a crimson nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d4dd656ce348ce2c846d87a203842b9f649e849.png) ![Diamond warpedthorn smithing recipe, it requires no template/upgrade, either a diamond mossthorn or diamond crimsonthorn and a warped nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1d6748e2e9cf0e0829a21cb52e38e8e909017a6.png)

Netherite:

![Netherite crimsonthorn smithing recipe, it requires no template/upgrade, either a netherite mossthorn or netherite warpedthorn and a crimson nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c0e871b08abb5bee7e2df29fab31af2eb8005ae.png) ![Netherite warpedthorn smithing recipe, it requires no template/upgrade, either a netherite mossthorn or netherite crimsonthorn and a warped nylium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4491f04a0582d3ca868f0ee7cab1d5c498c92e3.png)
Both Crimsonthorn and Warpedthorn can be turned into the other variant: ![Image shows a smithing recipee using no templante, a diamond crimosonthorn and a warped nylium, the result is a diamond warpedthorn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b24dc11fb60c5460bec5219cdf5851d6cbad9330.png) ![Image shows a smithing recipee using no templante, a netherite warpedthorn and a crimson nylium, the result is a netherite crimsonthorn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5afea033a05e988777691bb229eedd404c885996.png) There's a bug were you can turn the same variant into itself but won't do anything and it'll just consume a nylium :B
